cited_facts.why_it_matters: Describes the functional scope of the PermissionedDEX amendment (creating controlled trading environments) but does not specify the default vote stance of the source release.

output_json.decision_summary: The provided facts describe the functionality of the PermissionedDEX amendment, the general voting process, and the version in which it was introduced. However, none of the facts explicitly state the default vote (YES or NO) assigned to this amendment in the latest stable release source. Without explicit evidence of the default vote stance, the task rule requires outputting UNKNOWN.
output_json.forbidden_stronger_claim: This output is a replay classification, not proof of amendment correctness.
missing_evidence: Explicit statement of the default vote (YES/NO) for the PermissionedDEX amendment in the source release documentation.
